note: Groups of similar outputs (e.g., vault files) counted individually where schema distinct, grouped where schema identical

artifacts.name: client.yaml
artifacts.notes: Both clients have client.yaml. FastAPI client_id=fastapi, uuid=e65d2f0a-dfa7-4257-9333-fcbb583f0880.

artifacts.name: source_manifest.json
artifacts.consumer: run_client_pipeline.py (all phases — reads all path fields)
artifacts.notes: FastAPI source_manifest.json missing dom_layer_path and integration_validation_path fields. Will KeyError at Phase 5 and Phase 8a without fastapi_conformance_path.

artifacts.name: archive / boundary proxy file
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: archive at external filesystem path — not re-runnable from repo alone. FastAPI: MANIFEST_FILE_PROXY (SHA256 manifest file stands in for archive). Both exist and Phase 1 passes for both.

artifacts.name: canonical_repo / extracted source directory
artifacts.consumer: Phase 2 (phase_02_intake) — existence check; Phase 5 (structural analysis source)
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: clients/6a6fcdbc.../psee/intake/canonical_repo. FastAPI: clients/e65d2f0a.../input/intake/source/fastapi-backend (87 files). Both exist.

artifacts.name: 40.2/structural_node_inventory.json
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: at clients/6a6fcdbc.../psee/structure/40.2/ (955 nodes). FastAPI: at clients/e65d2f0a.../psee/runs/run_02_oss_fastapi/structure/40.2/ (124 nodes, generated by bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py). No generic callable producer exists — bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py is FastAPI-specific.

artifacts.name: 40.3/structural_topology_log.json
artifacts.notes: FastAPI: 123 CONTAINS relations, generated by bootstrap. No generic client-agnostic producer.

artifacts.name: 40.4/canonical_topology.json
artifacts.notes: FastAPI: 14 clusters. BlueEdge: 6 clusters (per Phase 3 description string).

artifacts.name: grounding_state_v3.json
artifacts.producer: External CEU grounding pipeline + integrated pipeline
artifacts.consumer: Phase 4 (readiness_gate check); Phase 8a (vault construction — evidence derivation)
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: at clients/6a6fcdbc.../psee/runs/run_blueedge_integrated_01/grounding_state_v3.json. FastAPI: ABSENT — only grounding_state_v2.json exists. This is GAP-REG-02, currently BLOCKING Phase 4 for FastAPI.

artifacts.name: integration_validation.json
artifacts.consumer: Phase 8a (admissibility proxy — no prior validation gate)
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: at clients/6a6fcdbc.../psee/runs/run_blueedge_integrated_01/integration_validation.json. FastAPI: ABSENT — field not even in source_manifest.json (REGISTRATION_INCOMPLETE). No validation gate before Phase 8a reads this.

artifacts.name: ceu_grounding_registry.json
artifacts.consumer: Phase 5 (native path only — DOM majority-vote for CE node assignment)
artifacts.notes: Required for Phase 5 native path only. BlueEdge uses conformance path, bypassing this. FastAPI: status unverified — registry/ subdir existence at ceu_grounding_path not confirmed. Not required if fastapi_conformance_path is set.

artifacts.name: dom_path_domain_layer.json
artifacts.consumer: Phase 5 (native path — CE node assignment); Phase 8a (topology domains construction)
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: at docs/psee/PI.BLUEEDGE.FASTAPI-CONFORMANCE.RECOMPUTE-FROM-EVIDENCE.01/recomputed/dom_path_domain_layer.json. ANOMALY: stored in docs/ not clients/ — not client-scoped. FastAPI: field absent from source_manifest.json; no artifact produced. No generic DOM layer generator exists.

artifacts.name: Conformance path artifacts (BE-C1 through BE-C5)
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge-only conformance bypass. Pre-computed signal artifacts that replace native Phase 5/6+7/8a computation. STAGE_NOT_AUTOMATED label. FastAPI has no fastapi_conformance_path field in source_manifest.json. This is the ONLY reason BlueEdge reaches Phase 9 — without it, BlueEdge native path would require ceu_grounding_registry.json + dom_layer_path as inputs to Phase 5.

artifacts.name: binding_envelope.json
artifacts.notes: BlueEdge: generated via conformance path. FastAPI: NOT REACHED — blocked at Phase 4.

artifacts.name: 75.x signal state artifacts (3 files)
artifacts.producer: run_client_pipeline.py phase_06_and_07_e2e (via run_end_to_end.py or conformance copy)
artifacts.notes: Files: condition_correlation_state.json, pressure_zone_state.json, pressure_candidate_state.json. BlueEdge: via conformance path. FastAPI: NOT REACHED.

artifacts.name: 41.x signal projection artifacts (2 files)
artifacts.notes: Files: signal_projection.json, pressure_zone_projection.json.

artifacts.name: vault/coverage_state.json
artifacts.notes: Derived from grounding_state_v3 evidence coverage.

artifacts.name: vault/canonical_topology.json
artifacts.notes: Derived from dom_path_domain_layer.json (topology domains construction).

artifacts.name: vault/signal_registry.json
artifacts.notes: Derived from conformance signal_registry or Phase 6+7 outputs.

artifacts.name: vault/binding_envelope.json
artifacts.notes: Copy of Phase 5 binding_envelope.json into vault.

artifacts.name: vault/admissibility_log.json
artifacts.notes: Derived from integration_validation.json (admissibility proxy).

artifacts.name: LENS report tree
artifacts.consumer: Phase 9 (selector update reads run_id and report metadata); end-user consumption
artifacts.notes: Includes: index.html, report_manifest.json, graph_state.json, graph_export.png, and PDF reports (executive, technical, signal detail). lens_report_generator.py calls export_graph_state.mjs.

artifacts.name: selector.json
artifacts.notes: Points to the current active run. Created if absent.

artifacts.name: available_runs.json
artifacts.notes: Appended with each new run.

artifacts.name: generic client-source structural scanner
artifacts.producer: NONE — does not exist in repo
artifacts.consumer: Would serve as Phase 3 generation sub-phase for any new client
artifacts.notes: The only existing structural scanner is bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py (FastAPI-specific). The 5 scripts in scripts/pios/40.x/ are k-pi-core self-analysis tools — incompatible with client source structural analysis. No client-agnostic scanner exists. This is the primary missing component for pipeline generalization.
